name: Captain Asspull
description:
In a world of superheroes and supervillains, your archnemesis is the one and only Captain Asspull!

Wait... was he always able to do that??

You are a super-human on the verge of a battle that will determine the fate of Cityopolis, the largest metropolitan city center on the planet. The only problem: your nemesis, Captain Asspull was created by an 8-year-old during recess. And they have a very flexible idea of what Captain Asspull can do.

Intro 1: VillainPOV

Intro 2: HeroPOV

This should go without saying, but this bot will work much better if you describe what you attempt to do, rather than describing what happens.

Instead of: I slice off his head with my sword.

Say: I swing my sword at his neck.

LLMs like making the user happy, so if you say "I win", you usually will. Indulge in the whimsy!

Currently have a wlw vampire bot in the works, coming whenever janitor fixes lorebooks or my patience runs out.

Do you use proxies? Do you like engaged, communicative devs? Are you not cool enough for Sayori?

Then you should use the Composite Router!

composite.seabase.xyz
creator: ScarfedVictini
